title: 「Used to」句型
titleZh: 「Used to 句」表達過去的習慣或情況
titleEn: Using Used to for past habits and situations

source.file: Sentence Structure 67 - 「Used to 句：表達過去曾經的習慣或情況」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + used to + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + used to + base verb + other information
Subject + did not / didn’t use to + base verb + other information
Did + subject + use to + base verb + other information?

example: When I was a child, I used to think about maths a lot.
exampleZh: 我小時候常常思考數學問題。

examples.en: When I was a child, I used to think about maths a lot.
examples.zh: 我小時候常常思考數學問題。

examples.en: I didn’t use to enjoy reading.
Did you use to walk to school?
examples.zh: 你以前是否常常步行上學？

meaning.zh: Used to 描述過去經常重複的行為、長時間存在的情況，或過去真實但現在已經不同的事情。

rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after used to.
rules.zh: Used to 後面必須使用動詞原形。

rules.en: Used to describes a repeated past action, a continuing past situation or something that was true in the past but is different now.
rules.zh: Used to 可描述過去經常重複的行為、長時間存在的情況，或過去真實但現在已經不同的事情。
examples: We used to visit our grandparents every Sunday.
This building used to be a school.

rules.en: Do not use used to for an event that happened only once.
rules.zh: 不要用 used to 描述只發生一次的事情；單次完成事件應使用一般過去式。

rules.en: Use use to rather than used to after did or didn’t.
rules.zh: 由於 did 或 didn’t 已經表示過去時間，否定句和疑問句使用 use to，而不是 used to。
examples: I didn’t use to drink coffee.
Did you use to live here?

rules.en: Used to can be followed by a stative verb such as be, have, know, like, believe or live.
rules.zh: Used to 可以配合表示狀態的動詞，例如 be、have、know、like、believe 或 live。
examples: Daniel used to be very quiet.

rules.en: Used to + base verb describes a past habit or state; be used to + noun / V-ing means being accustomed to something.
rules.zh: Used to + 動詞原形表示以前常做或過去的情況；be used to + 名詞／V-ing 表示已經習慣某事。
examples: Tim used to talk to strangers.
Tim is now used to talking to strangers.
She is used to the cold weather.

benefits.en: It clearly shows that something was true in the past but may now be different.
benefits.zh: Used to 能讓讀者立即知道某件事在過去是真實的，但現在可能已經改變。

benefits.en: It describes a past habit more concisely than a longer phrase such as when I was young or in the past.
benefits.zh: 你不需要每次都使用 when I was young、in the past、often 或 regularly 等較長表達。

benefits.en: It is suitable for childhood memories, former lifestyles and personal change.
benefits.zh: 這個句型很適合用於日常對話、故事、自我介紹和口語考試，描述童年、舊生活和個人改變。

benefits.en: It can describe both past actions and past states.
benefits.zh: Used to 不只可以描述以前常做的事情，也可以描述以前的性格、想法、住所或環境。

benefits.en: It reduces repetition and adds structural variety when describing the past.
benefits.zh: 當你需要多次描述過去時，used to 能代替反覆使用 In the past、When I was young 或 Many years ago，使句子更自然。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using used to or use to to describe a past habit or situation.
Use the positive, negative or question form according to the meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 used to 或 use to 改寫以下句子，以描述過去的習慣或情況。
請按照原句意思使用肯定句、否定句或疑問句。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: When I was six, I often drew animals after school.
questions.promptZh: 我六歲時，放學後常常畫動物。
questions.answer: I used to draw animals after school when I was six.
questions.answerZh: 我六歲時常常在放學後畫動物。
questions.highlight: I used to draw animals after school when I was six.

questions.prompt: Lily often walked to primary school, but she takes the bus now.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉以前常常步行上小學，但她現在乘搭巴士。
questions.answer: Lily used to walk to primary school.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉以前常常步行上小學。
questions.highlight: Lily used to walk to primary school.

questions.prompt: Ben regularly played football in the park on Sundays.
questions.promptZh: 本過去每逢星期日都會在公園踢足球。
questions.answer: Ben used to play football in the park on Sundays.
questions.answerZh: 本以前每逢星期日都會在公園踢足球。
questions.highlight: Ben used to play football in the park on Sundays.

questions.prompt: My family lived in a small flat before we moved here.
questions.promptZh: 我們搬到這裏之前，一家人住在一個小單位。
questions.answer: My family used to live in a small flat before we moved here.
questions.answerZh: 我們搬到這裏之前，一家人住在一個小單位。
questions.highlight: My family used to live in a small flat before we moved here.

questions.prompt: The shop was a bakery many years ago.
questions.promptZh: 很多年前，這間店舖是一間麵包店。
questions.answer: The shop used to be a bakery.
questions.answerZh: 這間店舖以前是一間麵包店。
questions.highlight: The shop used to be a bakery.

questions.prompt: We often visited our grandparents during the school holidays.
questions.promptZh: 我們以前常常在學校假期探望祖父母。
questions.answer: We used to visit our grandparents during the school holidays.
questions.answerZh: 我們以前常常在學校假期探望祖父母。
questions.highlight: We used to visit our grandparents during the school holidays.

questions.prompt: Nina drank a glass of milk every morning when she was a child.
questions.promptZh: 妮娜小時候每天早上都會喝一杯牛奶。
questions.answer: Nina used to drink a glass of milk every morning as a child.
questions.answerZh: 妮娜小時候每天早上都會喝一杯牛奶。
questions.highlight: Nina used to drink a glass of milk every morning as a child.

questions.prompt: There were fewer cars on this road in the past.
questions.promptZh: 過去這條道路上的汽車比較少。
questions.answer: There used to be fewer cars on this road.
questions.answerZh: 以前這條道路上的汽車比較少。
questions.highlight: There used to be fewer cars on this road.

questions.prompt: Sam had long hair at university, but his hair is short now.
questions.promptZh: 森在大學時留有長髮，但他的頭髮現在很短。
questions.answer: Sam used to have long hair at university.
questions.answerZh: 森讀大學時曾經留有長髮。
questions.highlight: Sam used to have long hair at university.

questions.prompt: I did not like spicy food when I was younger.
questions.promptZh: 我年輕時並不喜歡辛辣食物。
questions.answer: I didn’t use to like spicy food when I was younger.
questions.answerZh: 我年輕時並不喜歡辛辣食物。
questions.highlight: I didn’t use to like spicy food when I was younger.

questions.prompt: Every evening, Omar would read by the window before going to bed.
questions.promptZh: 奧馬爾以前每天晚上睡覺前都會坐在窗邊閱讀。
questions.answer: Omar used to read by the window every evening before going to bed.
questions.answerZh: 奧馬爾以前每天晚上睡覺前都會坐在窗邊閱讀。
questions.highlight: Omar used to read by the window every evening before going to bed.

questions.prompt: It was Amy’s habit to keep a diary when she was a teenager.
questions.promptZh: 艾米年輕時有寫日記的習慣。
questions.answer: Amy used to keep a diary when she was a teenager.
questions.answerZh: 艾米年輕時有寫日記的習慣。
questions.highlight: Amy used to keep a diary when she was a teenager.

questions.prompt: Before online banking became common, people often paid their bills at the bank.
questions.promptZh: 網上銀行普及之前，人們經常親身到銀行繳交帳單。
questions.answer: People used to pay their bills at the bank before online banking became common.

questions.prompt: We never ate out on weekdays when I was young.

questions.prompt: Every summer, the cousins would stay with their aunt in the countryside.
questions.promptZh: 這些表兄弟姊妹以前每年夏天都會到鄉郊與姨母同住。

questions.prompt: Was working night shifts a regular part of your father’s job in the past?

questions.prompt: The library once closed at six, but it now remains open until nine.

questions.prompt: Before smartphones were available, I often carried a paper map.
questions.promptZh: 智能電話面世之前，我經常隨身攜帶紙製地圖。

questions.prompt: Was this building a hospital in the past?

questions.prompt: The town did not have a public swimming pool ten years ago.

questions.prompt: In earlier years, did the company send every invoice by post rather than by email?
questions.promptZh: 以前這間公司是否以郵寄而不是電郵方式寄出每張發票？
questions.answer: Did the company use to send every invoice by post rather than by email?
questions.answerZh: 這間公司以前是否以郵寄而不是電郵方式寄出每張發票？
questions.highlight: Did the company use to send every invoice by post rather than by email?
